Definition: The minimum and maximum volume of the administered radiopharmaceutical in cubic cm. See DICOM tag (0018, 1071) Radiopharmaceutical Volume

The minimum and maximum of the radiopharmaceutical dose administered to the patient measured in MegaBecquerels (MBq) at the Radiopharmaceutical Start DateTime (0018,1078). See DICOM tag (0018,1074) Radionuclide Total Dose.
